calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice
Off Calendar Apr-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ara Ray Jabagchourian, Esq. 650-437-6840 for Plaintiff.
Kevin Mintz, Esq. 510-433-2600 Rankin Shuey Ranucci Mintz Lampasona & Reynolds for Defendant.
Court reporter: Kaitlyn Houston, CSR #14170, kaitlynbhouston@gmail.com, 530-277-5252, Reported.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces the tentative ruling. Mr. Mintz argues. Plaintiff's counsel responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT 4201 DALE RD LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Defendant's motion for summary judgment is denied. (see word minutes for full details)

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Kaaitlyn Houston, CSR #14170, kaitlynbhouston@gmail.com, 530-277-5252, Reported. (302/JMQ)
